Variables.Name: SplineResolution
Variables.Description: Resolution of the spline, in distance per point

Variables.Name: SplineColor
Variables.Description: Color to use to draw the splines

Variables.Name: ControlPointSprite
Variables.Description: Sprite used to draw control points

Variables.Name: SplineEditorMesh
Variables.Description: Mesh used to draw splines that have no mesh

Variables.Name: bShowSplineEditorMesh
Variables.Description: Whether we are in-editor and showing spline editor meshes
